models.name: gpt5_6_sol
models.notes: Flagship GPT-5.6 model with the strongest capability for complex coding, computer use, research, and cybersecurity

models.name: gpt5_6_terra
models.notes: Balanced GPT-5.6 model for everyday coding and agentic work, with strong capability at lower cost than Sol

models.name: gpt5_6_luna
models.notes: Fast and affordable GPT-5.6 model for clear, repeatable coding tasks and high-volume workflows

models.name: gpt5_5
models.notes: Newest frontier model for complex coding, computer use, knowledge work, and research workflows; recommended choice for most Codex tasks (ChatGPT sign-in only)

models.name: gpt5_4
models.notes: Flagship frontier model for professional work with strong reasoning, tool use, and agentic workflows, including GPT-5.3-Codex coding capabilities

models.name: gpt5_4_mini
models.notes: Fast, efficient mini model for responsive coding tasks and subagents; lower-cost option for lighter coding work

models.name: gpt5_3codex
models.notes: Industry-leading coding model for complex software engineering; its coding capabilities also power GPT-5.4

models.name: gpt5_3codex_spark
models.notes: Text-only research preview model for near-instant coding iteration; available to ChatGPT Pro users

models.name: gpt5_2
models.notes: Previous general-purpose model for coding and agentic tasks
